content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.66%, Bank Nifty -1.59%, PSU Bank -3.15%, VIX +3.4% to 17.18 — broad-market risk-off but pockets of pronounced earnings-driven leadership (IT, Capital Goods, Chemicals, Auto). Book is +1.29% on the day with COFORGE and PNBHOUSING as standout winners on Q4 prints; priority is to lock in gains via tight trailing stops and let the rest run to existing SL/target.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1065.16,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.2% unrealized winner, Q4 PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%. CMP 1085, current SL 1065.16 already locks +8.3%. Holding SL where it is — already meaningfully above breakeven, and >1% trail-gap below CMP (1.8%). Bearish engulfing + Doji on 5/4-5/5 daily warns of intraday chop; tighter trail risks self-stopout. No-op MODIFY → converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL at 1065.16 (+8.3% locked) sits 1.8% below CMP 1085 — within trail-gap discipline. Target 1135 still 4.6% away. No new info to act on."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; -0.7% with VIX rising +3.4% argues for keeping the hedge. SL 121 is appropriate (~2.6% below CMP). Target 135 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 821.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 revenue +22%, stock at ATH 836.50 today on 2.7x volume. CMP 829.95, current SL 820 = entry. Trailing SL up 1pt to 821 (just above breakeven) — locks small gain while preserving 1.07% trail-gap below CMP. Target 855 intact (~3% upside)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.2% winner; SL 1341.52 already locks +6.6% gain, 1.3% below CMP 1359.20 — within trail-gap discipline. Encora deal + AI-led re-rating; raising target from 1420 to 1450 to give room (16% intraday move on volume). MODIFY target only; SL stays — tightening further would self-stopout on normal post-rally chop. Bearish MACD crossover noted but driven by fast-mean lag during gap-up."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.6%, faded from 3129 high to 3041; defence sector still strong but stock extended +49% in April. SL 3030 sits just below CMP 3041 — 0.4% gap, BELOW the 1% trail-gap floor. NOT tightening further. If 3030 fires it's part of plan; if held, target 3225 in play."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.0% winner. SL 825 already locks +2.4% gain, 1.4% below CMP 836.50 — within trail-gap. Q4 record EBITDA margin 46.5%; thesis intact. No-op effectively, keeping current levels — converting MODIFY signal into HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 825 locks profit, gap to CMP 836.50 is 1.4% — proper trail. Target 875 ~4.6% upside. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Just entered; -0.2%. Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +280bps. SL 1465 (-1.7%), target 1575 (+6%) — R:R intact, thesis intact. Let the SL do its work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.66,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%; Q4 turnaround thesis intact. SL 1580 (-2.3% from CMP 1603.20), target 1740 (+8.5%). Pre-SL exit discipline applies — let SL fire if it must. No new bearish info."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry; SRF +10.4% on Q4 print but holding gains. SL 2755 (-1.1%), target 2920 (+4.9%). Chemicals sector at 6-month high; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.66,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%; Q4 record revenue, fresh ATH. SL 9020 (-1.1%), target 9550 (+4.7%). Dividend Rs 47/share. Hold to plan."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%; Q4 PAT -17% on Labour Codes one-off but +6.99% today on FY27 25% growth guide + defence book Rs 10,961 Cr. SL 1955 (-2.1%), target 2110 (+5.6%). Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat; Q4 PAT +30.6%, lending book +32% YoY. SL 354 (-2.4%), target 384 (+5.8%). Banking weakness today but ABCAPITAL diversified mix held up. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%; Q4 PAT +34%, buyback at Rs 12,000 = ~12% premium to CMP 10686. SL 10440 (-2.3%), target 11260 (+5.4%). Buyback floor supports downside; thesis very strong. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1065.16 already locks +8.3%; 1.8% trail-gap below CMP — proper. Don't tighten into chop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; VIX rising supports holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 821.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL from 820 (entry) to 821 — locks small gain, 1.07% trail-gap from CMP 829.95."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1341.52 locks +6.6%, 1.3% below CMP — within discipline. Target raised to 1450 to give room for momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 3030 only 0.4% below CMP — already too tight to tighten further. Let it play out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 825 locks +2.4%, 1.4% below CMP — proper trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry; SL/target intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround thesis intact; let SL 1580 do its work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Chemicals leadership intact, hold to plan."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "ATH on Q4 print, hold to plan."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defence + FY27 guidance thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Diversified financial conglomerate thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback support + record Q4 — strongest setup in book. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DABUR LIMIT 487 still OPEN from earlier — let it work or expire EOD; not stacking. HFCL MIS LIMIT 133.50 has been OPEN 3445 minutes (multiple sessions) — this is a stale order that should never have carried; flagging for cancellation review but engine should auto-expire MIS overnight. THERMAX +13% post-Q4 on big order book — too extended after running at 52-week high zone, no chase. NUVAMA +19.7% — extended; wait for base. NBCC and TATATECH watching but no clean entry. INDUSINDBK explicitly DEFERRED — SFIO/SEBI overhang per Rule 13 unresolved, not entering. FINCABLES has Q4 board on May 10 (Saturday) — Rule 11 binary-event within 3 sessions, no new entry. BAJAJ-AUTO already held — not adding (already 4 shares = ~4.3% capital, and buyback floor caps near-term upside).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 61% — within soft 80% target with cushion. 13 holdings is dense; today's session is about LETTING WINNERS RUN with disciplined trailing, not adding new names into a -0.66% Nifty / -1.59% Bank Nifty / VIX +3.4% tape. Most holdings reported Q4 in last 48 hours and are reacting positively — that's the carry. New entries today would mean chasing extended Q4-pop names (THERMAX, SRF +10%, COFORGE +16%, POLYCAB +9%) — bad R:R. Holding fire on admit side is justified by the explicit risk-off macro tape (cf. Rule 18: explicit reject reasons stated for every BULLISH watchlist candidate). Per-position risk budget audit clean: largest risk-budget consumers are BAJAJ-AUTO (4.3% × 3% SL = 0.13%) and POLYCAB (4.5% × 1.1% SL = 0.05%), all well within 0.5% per-name cap."
}
